presets.label: Clean execution
presets.summary: Valid authority, in-scope action, approved review, current evidence, remedy available. The gate allows execution and issues an executed receipt.

objective.description: Maintain the account holder's notification preference when explicitly requested.
hard_constraints: Do not change identity, payment, eligibility, or access-control fields.
Create a receipt for every attempted persistent change.

remedy.restoration_steps: Restore the recorded before_state after accountable review.
remedy.time_limit: Submit within 30 calendar days of notice.

privacy.retention_basis: Retain the minimum event evidence required for verification, review, and remedy.
